title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository with the core Go CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama, providing simple sync/async clients to chat, generate text, and manage local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama with Node.js and browser support for running and chatting with local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that adds Ollama as a local LLM backend for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama featuring chat history, model switching, code highlighting, and multimodal support.

title: helm-ollama
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama offering synchronous and asynchronous clients with model management and streaming chat APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, supporting streaming completions and model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, managing prompts, and switching models on the fly.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-use Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, Open-WebUI, or LangChain for quick local playgrounds.

title: ollama-helm-chart
summary: Another community Helm chart focused on production use with ingress, monitoring, and optional private registry mirrors.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that spins up ephemeral Ollama containers to run tests or generate code/docs with local models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installations and declarative service configs on NixOS.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async HTTP bindings and strong typing for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with chat, generation, and model management endpoints wrapped in idiomatic C# async methods.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets users chat with any local Ollama model through slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for generating and rewriting notes with Ollama models directly inside the editor via custom commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket Mode to answer questions with Ollama models in channels or DMs without exposing them to the internet.
